layers.nm: Why is the left ventricle wall thicker?

s.t: Why is the left ventricle wall thicker?
Why is the left ventricle wall thicker?
The left ventricle must generate enough force to push blood through the entire body. Pressure equals force over area, so thicker muscle fibers generate more force.
